title: Cenostigma pellucidum
intro: Cenostigma pellucidum is a plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae, commonly known as a medicinal shrub or tree. The plant is valued for its health benefits, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as wounds, infections, and fever. The bioactive constituents of Cenostigma pellucidum include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic compounds, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Cenostigma pellucidum is often made into herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat a range of health issues.
taxonomy: Cenostigma pellucidum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It belongs to the genus Cenostigma, which is a group of plants native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is further classified as a part of the subfamily Caesalpinioideae, a subfamily of legumes that are characterized by their palmate compound leaves. Within the Caesalpinioideae subfamily, Cenostigma pellucidum is placed in the tribe Cassieae, a group of plants that are commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The exact classification of Cenostigma pellucidum is as follows: Cenostigma pellucidum belongs to the kingdom Plantae, the phylum Magnoliophyta, the class Magnoliopsida, the order Fabales, the family Fabaceae, the subfamily Caesalpinioideae, and the tribe Cassieae.
uses: Cenostigma pellucidum is known for its potential medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions. Its extracts have been investigated for antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The plant's leaves and stems are often used in herbal remedies, but the specific uses and benefits may vary depending on the region and cultural context. Further studies are required to fully understand the medicinal potential of Cenostigma pellucidum.

properties: Cenostigma pellucidum has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. constituents: Cenostigma pellucidum is a plant species with limited information available on its active constituents.
